prerequisite_concepts.name: Response Variable
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Response Variable is the main quantity to read from this equation; the right-hand side shows which terms determine it.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Response Variable 是这条公式要读出的核心量；等号右侧说明它由哪些条件和符号共同决定。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: Additive Genetic Variance describes spread or joint movement among variables.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Additive Genetic Variance 描述变量之间的离散程度或共同变化，用来判断变化有多宽、是否一起移动。

introduced_concepts.name: Within-Block Environmental Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: The residual environmental variance within blocks after stratification.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 分层后区组内部剩余的环境方差。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: Trait Variance describes spread or joint movement among variables.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Trait Variance 描述变量之间的离散程度或共同变化，用来判断变化有多宽、是否一起移动。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 14.20a Mean
introduced_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

introduced_concepts.name: Selection Differential
introduced_concepts.definition: The change in mean trait value caused by selection before transmission.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 选择作用在遗传传递之前造成的平均性状值变化。
